title: corynanthe lane-poolei subsp. ituriense
intro: Corynanthe lane-poolei subsp. ituriense is a subspecies of plant within the Corynanthe genus, which is a type of evergreen tree native to tropical Africa. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly the presence of yohimbine, a compound that has been used to treat a range of health conditions. The health benefits of Corynanthe lane-poolei subsp. ituriense include its potential to improve erectile dysfunction, boost energy levels, and aid in weight loss. In herbal preparations, the bark and roots of the plant are often used to create extracts and tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
